mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cb.amount), 0) as totalRevenue, COUNT(DISTINCT cb.booking_no) as totalOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking_review br WHERE br.dept_id = #{deptId} AND br.status = 1) as totalReviews, COALESCE(AVG(br.rating), 0) as avgRating FROM car_booking cb LEFT JOIN booking_review br ON cb.booking_no = br.booking_no WHERE cb.dept_id = #{deptId} AND cb.status = 2 AND cb.pay_status = 2

SELECT DATE(cb.create_time) as date, COALESCE(SUM(cb.amount), 0) as revenue, COUNT(cb.booking_no) as orderCount FROM car_booking cb WHERE cb.dept_id = #{deptId} AND cb.status = 2 AND cb.pay_status = 2 AND cb.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(cb.create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT id, dept_id as deptId, work_date as workDate, open_time as openTime, close_time as closeTime, slot_minutes as slotMinutes, car_spaces as carSpaces, status FROM dept_schedule WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND work_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY work_date ASC LIMIT 7
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dept_schedule ( dept_id, work_date, open_time, close_time, slot_minutes, car_spaces, status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{deptId}, #{workDate}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{slotMinutes}, #{carSpaces}, #{status}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, dept_id as deptId, space_no as spaceNo, space_name as spaceName, status FROM dept_car_space WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} ORDER BY space_no
